summary: Iteration 7: Full test of audio R2 sync, module filtering, real modules in course detail, Sijill renaming. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). 5 of 5 testable frontend scenarios passed. Expo service has intermittent ngrok tunnel crashes (environment issue, not code issue) but app works when stable.

minor.issue: Course 'cours-falsafa-grands' and other sync-created courses have duration=None and scholar_name=None in DB. Causes 'NaNmin' in UI and missing scholar name. Courses need these fields populated.

ui_bugs.issue: 'NaNmin' displayed for duration because course doc has duration=null in MongoDB. formatCourseDuration(null) returns NaN.
ui_bugs.selector: Text with duration in meta row

ui_bugs.issue: Only initial 'S' shown for scholar (no name label) because scholar_name=null in DB for sync-created courses. Course data seeded by sync script lacks scholar_id/scholar_name.

issues: 'Too many screens defined. Route ma-bibliotheque is extraneous.' warning - duplicate route in layout

test_results_detail.backend_test_2: PASS: GET /api/modules?course_id=cours-falsafa-grands → 10 real modules (Al-Kindī, Al-Fārābī, Avicenne...)
test_results_detail.backend_test_3: PASS: GET /api/audios/aud_cours-falsafa-grands-mod-1/stream-url → R2 presigned URL returned (source='r2', expires_in=3600)
test_results_detail.backend_test_4: PASS: GET /api/cursus → 5 cursus (A-E), no Henry Corbin
test_results_detail.backend_test_5: PASS: GET /api/audios → 70 audios, 0 Henry Corbin (aud-corbin-*) audios
test_results_detail.frontend_test_6: PASS: Login page shows 'Sijill' (not 'Le Sijill') - about.tsx renaming confirmed
test_results_detail.frontend_test_7: PASS: Login with testuser@hikma.com/TestUser123! works, cursus page accessible with 5 cursus
test_results_detail.frontend_test_8: PASS: Course detail page (cours-falsafa-grands) shows 10 real modules with scholar names
test_results_detail.frontend_test_9: PASS: First module (Al-Kindī v. 870-950/951) has green play button + 'Aperçu gratuit' badge, clickable for non-subscribers

action_items: LOW: Populate duration, scholar_id, scholar_name, level, topic fields for sync-created courses (cours-falsafa-grands etc.) to fix NaNmin display
INFO: Fix duplicate ma-bibliotheque route warning in Expo layout (non-critical console warning)
INFO: Expo ngrok tunnel keeps restarting - environment-level issue, not code issue. App functions correctly on port 3000
critical_code_review_comments: Sync script (sync_r2_audios.py) creates minimal course docs without populating duration/scholar_name/level/topic - these need to be added to the script or courses need manual data completion
public_list_modules filters is_active=True - ensure all real modules have is_active=True (confirmed: all 101 modules are active)
GET /api/audios returns max 100 items (to_list(100)) - with 70 audios currently OK but needs pagination if collection grows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All R2 audio sync features verified working. 70 audios in DB all linked to modules. Stream-URL returns real R2 presigned URLs. Login/cursus/course detail all working. Known minor: sync-created courses missing duration/scholar_name fields. Expo service uses ngrok tunnel which is intermittently unstable but port 3000 always works.
rca_of_issue: NaNmin display in course detail: DB course doc created by sync_r2_audios.py only stores id/title/cursus_id/description/order/is_active but omits duration, scholar_name, scholar_id, level, topic. Frontend formatCourseDuration(None/undefined) returns NaN.
